_comment: Registry for the agentic-workflow kit sync (distribute_kit.py). The canonical source is kriegerdataforge-cicd/kit/common/. 'files' are the byte-identical, language-agnostic kit paths synced to every repo in 'repos'. check mode reports drift; distribute mode opens one PR per drifted repo (never auto-merges). See ADR D-001 / kriegerdataforge/docs/epics/agent-kit-distribution.md.
_excluded_notes: kriegerdataforge-cicd is the SOURCE — its own kit/common IS the canonical, so it is not a sync target (no self-PRs). The 4 kriegerdataforge-template-* repos join once committed + is_template (epic slice P2). .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md is intentionally NOT in 'files' until the 3-way fork is reconciled (epic slice P1). AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules / .github/copilot-instructions.md are per-repo and never synced. Before running distribute, each repo's version-check must paths-ignore the kit paths (ADR D-001 option B), or the docs-only sync PRs fail that gate.
